{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Awakened tigers
| introduced = Of Darkness and Dawn
}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The tiger statues at the mansion are [[Awakened]] and can move of their own volition.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c10">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
